Global (All).title: US-China Tech Cold War Escalates
Global (All).summary: Tensions between the US and China intensified as the US blacklisted more Chinese tech firms on national security concerns.

Global (All).title: NATO Expands Into Eastern Europe
Global (All).summary: NATO has expanded into Eastern Europe, fuelling concern of increased military tensions and potential conflict with Russia.

Global (All).title: European Gas Prices Surge
Global (All).summary: As geopolitical tensions increase, so did European gas prices due to supply disruptions and logistical bottlenecks.

United States.summary: US House Votes to Limit Biden's National Emergency Declaration Power
US Senate Passes Bill to Prevent Rail Strike, Averting Economic Crisis
Supreme Court Ruling on Abortion Expected to Have Far-Reaching Consequences

South Korea.title: Tensions rise with North Korea as US and South Korea hold joint military drills
South Korea.summary: The United States and South Korea have begun their largest joint military drills in months, amid rising tensions with North Korea.

South Korea.title: South Korea to strengthen surveillance to counter North Korea's cyber threats
South Korea.summary: South Korea has plans to enhance its cybersecurity measures to counter North Korea's growing cyber threats and disrupt operations.

South Korea.title: Pro-CHOE government protest in South Korea turns violent
South Korea.summary: Protest in South Korea against the new government escalated into clashes between the protesters and police on Monday, leaving several people injured.

Japan.title: Japan protests erupt over nuclear policy
Japan.summary: Opposition groups held rallies in Tokyo, calling for the government to adopt a more cautious nuclear energy approach.

Japan.title: North Korea tests missiles near Japan's territorial waters
Japan.summary: Seoul and Washington condemn the latest provocation, with South Korea's military saying Tokyo and Seoul agreed to work together to protect their shared interests.

Japan.title: Japan's ruling party leader faces opposition over support for Ukraine
Japan.summary: Critics accuse the leader of the Liberal Democratic Party (LDP) of being overly sympathetic to Ukraine, sparking internal party divisions and external pressure from Moscow.
